endpoints.name: POST /v3/{account}/hotels:setLiveOnGoogle
endpoints.description: Collection-level custom method to update the Live on Google status for multiple properties. Each call can turn on or off multiple hotels. To turn some hotels on and turn some hotels off, you will have to make multiple calls.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNT}} with a real account.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Returns a reconciliation report.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes an account link.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v3/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a brand.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{name}/participationReportViews:query
endpoints.description: Provides the ability to query (get, filter, and segment) a participation report for a particular account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{name}/propertyPerformanceReportViews:query
endpoints.description: Provides the ability to query (get, filter, and segment) a property performance links report for a specific account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/accountLinks
endpoints.description: Returns the account links for a Hotel Center account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/accountLinks
endpoints.description: Creates a new account link between a Hotel Center account and a Google Ads account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/brands
endpoints.description: Returns the brands for a partner account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/brands
endpoints.description: Creates a new brand. Because Google detects brands from your existing properties, you only need this operation when you want to configure a brand before you send its properties to Google. Note that it might take a couple of days after your listing feed first provides a brand for the brand to appear.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/hotelViews
endpoints.description: Returns the list of hotel views.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/hotelViews:summarize
endpoints.description: Returns summarized information about hotels.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/icons
endpoints.description: Returns the `Icon`s for a partner account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/icons
endpoints.description: Uploads a new icon and starts its review process. Generates an `icon_id` and includes it in the icon's resource name, which is the format `accounts/{account_id}/icons/{icon_id}` Returns HTTP status 400 and doesn't trigger the review process if the icon has any of these conditions: * Image is not in PNG format, or not convertible to PNG format. * Size less than 72 pixels * Size greater than 1200 pixels * Aspect ratio other than 1:1
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/listings:verify
endpoints.description: returns verified listings with data issues and serving eligibilities
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/priceAccuracyViews
endpoints.description: Lists the available price accuracy views.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/priceAccuracyViews:summarize
endpoints.description: Returns the price accuracy summary.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/priceCoverageViews
endpoints.description: Returns the entire price coverage history.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/priceCoverageViews:latest
endpoints.description: Returns the latest price coverage view in full detail.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v3/{parent}/reconciliationReports
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the names of created reconciliation reports.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/reconciliationReports
endpoints.description: Creates a reconciliation report and uploads it to Google.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v3/{parent}/reconciliationReports:validate
endpoints.description: Validates a reconciliation report.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
